use_codes.desc: RELIEF OF OCULAR ITCHING DUE TO SEASONAL ALLERGIC CONJUNCTIVITIS

indications.text:
ACULAR ophthalmic solution is indicated for the temporary relief of ocular itching
due to seasonal allergic conjunctivitis. ACULAR ophthalmic solution is also indicated
for the treatment of postoperative inflammation in patients who have undergone cataract
extraction.

ACULAR is indicated for the temporary relief of ocular itching due to seasonal allergic
conjunctivitis. ACULAR is also indicated for the treatment of postoperative inflammation in
patients who have undergone cataract extraction.

ACULAR ophthalmic solution is indicated for the temporary relief of ocular itching due to seasonal
allergic conjunctivitis. ACULAR ophthalmic solution is also indicated for the treatment of
postoperative inflammation in patients who have undergone cataract extraction.
